intro: Answers to the questions we hear most — about {{BRAND_NAME}}, about buying and selling {{BREED}} genetics, and about the breed itself. New to {{BREED}}? Start anywhere; the help assistant at the bottom can answer anything not covered here.

items.a: {{BRAND_NAME}} is a global marketplace and knowledge hub for {{BREED}} genetics — semen and embryos — plus the breed's history, foundation bloodlines, a live price index, and translated global news.
Yes. Listing genetics is free. Revenue comes from optional featured placement and advertising, not from sellers.
